phrases.text_local: Recomenda algum restaurante autêntico por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: Reh-koo-MEHN-dah AHL-goom rehs-tow-RAHN-chee ow-TEHN-tee-koh poor ah-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um feirante no Mercado Municipal. Eles costumam conhecer bons restaurantes típicos.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih NOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL. EH-lihsh koosh-TOO-muhng koo-nyih-SEHR BOHNGSH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh TEE-pee-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a market vendor at the Municipal Market. They usually know good traditional restaurants.

responses.english: Ask a market vendor at the Municipal Market. They usually know good traditional restaurants.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG fay-RAHNNG-tih NOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL. EH-lihsh koosh-TOO-muhng koo-nyih-SEHR BOHNGSH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh TEE-pee-koosh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um feirante no Mercado Municipal. Eles costumam conhecer bons restaurantes típicos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Santa Clara Bridge is
phrases.text_local: Podes indicar-me onde fica a Ponte de Santa Clara?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-desh in-dee-KAR-meh ON-deh FEE-kah ah PON-teh deh SAHN-tah KLAH-rah?
phrases.cultural_note: The Santa Clara Bridge (Ponte de Santa Clara) is a historic bridge spanning the Mondego River, a key landmark in Coimbra.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas. Fica perto do Mercado Municipal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh. FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs. It's near the Mercado Municipal.

responses.english: Follow the signs. It's near the Mercado Municipal.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh. FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas. Fica perto do Mercado Municipal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the municipal market is
phrases.text_local: Você pode me dizer onde fica o Mercado Municipal?
phrases.pronunciation: voh-SEH PAW-dih MIH dee-ZEHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The market operates daily with fresh local produce and traditional food stalls.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Mercado Municipal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Municipal Market.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Municipal Market.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Mercado Municipal.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar as bancas do Mercado Municipal?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR UHSH BAHNNG-kuhsh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Mercado Municipal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Municipal Market.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Municipal Market.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Mercado Municipal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist info kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Podem indicar onde está o posto de turismo?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo?
phrases.cultural_note: Central kiosks offer free city maps, event schedules, and official transport info.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica na Praça da República.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is at Praça da República.

responses.english: Good morning, it is at Praça da República.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NUH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica na Praça da República.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Almedina Arch is
phrases.text_local: Como chego ao Arco de Almedina a partir daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW-AR-koo jee-al-meh-DEE-nah ah-par-TEER dah-KEE
phrases.cultural_note: Almedina Arch is a historic Moorish gate marking the entrance to the old town.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, suba a Rua Ferreira Borges direto.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SOO-buh AH ROOUH feh-RAY-ruh BOH-ruh-zhihsh dee-REH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go up Rua Ferreira Borges straight ahead.

responses.english: Good morning, go up Rua Ferreira Borges straight ahead.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SOO-buh AH ROOUH feh-RAY-ruh BOH-ruh-zhihsh dee-REH-too.
responses.local: Bom dia, suba a Rua Ferreira Borges direto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tram ticket validation machines are
phrases.text_local: Hello, where are the ticket validation machines?
phrases.pronunciation: EH-loo, WEH-rih AH-rih ehn-UHPTPT tee-KEHTSH vuh-lee-DAY-shahnng muh-SHEE-nihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: At tram stops in Coimbra, validation machines are typically located near the boarding area. Validate your ticket before boarding to avoid fines.

likely_response.local: At the tram stops, near the platforms.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHT ehn-UHPTPT TROWN STOHPSH, NEEAHR ehn-UHPTPT pluht-FOH-ruhmsh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the tram stops, near the platforms.

responses.english: At the tram stops, near the platforms.
responses.phonetic: AHT ehn-UHPTPT TROWN STOHPSH, NEEAHR ehn-UHPTPT pluht-FOH-ruhmsh.
responses.local: At the tram stops, near the platforms.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the municipal market is
phrases.cultural_note: The Mercado Municipal is a bustling historic market in the heart of Baixa de Coimbra, offering fresh produce and local specialties.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Mercado Municipal na Baixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL NUH BEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Municipal Market in Baixa.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Municipal Market in Baixa.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL NUH BEYE-shuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Mercado Municipal na Baixa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Almedina Arch is
phrases.text_local: Excuse me, where is the Almedina Arch?
phrases.pronunciation: ehsh-KOO-zih MIH, WEH-rih EESH ehn-UHPTPT ahl-mih-DEE-nuh AH-ruhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Arco de Almedina is a historic gateway to the old city. It's a popular meeting point and landmark in the Baixa area.

likely_response.local: In the old city center, near Rua Ferreira Borges.
likely_response.pronunciation: EEN ehn-UHPTPT AWLD SEE-tee sayng-TEHR, NEEAHR ROOUH feh-RAY-ruh BOH-ruh-zhihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: In the old city center, near Rua Ferreira Borges.

responses.english: In the old city center, near Rua Ferreira Borges.
responses.phonetic: EEN ehn-UHPTPT AWLD SEE-tee sayng-TEHR, NEEAHR ROOUH feh-RAY-ruh BOH-ruh-zhihsh.
responses.local: In the old city center, near Rua Ferreira Borges.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to validate tram tickets
phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar os bilhetes do elétrico nesta zona?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR OOSH bee-LYEH-tihsh DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo NEHSH-tuh ZOH-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Validating tickets immediately upon boarding is mandatory to avoid fines.

likely_response.local: Use as máquinas de validação sinalizadas nas paragens.
likely_response.pronunciation: OO-zih UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH vuh-lee-duh-SOWN see-nuh-lee-ZAH-duhsh NUHSH puh-RAH-zhayngsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Use the validation machines indicated at the stops.

responses.english: Use the validation machines indicated at the stops.
responses.phonetic: OO-zih UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH vuh-lee-duh-SOWN see-nuh-lee-ZAH-duhsh NUHSH puh-RAH-zhayngsh.
responses.local: Use as máquinas de validação sinalizadas nas paragens.
